allow: Bash(find /usr/local/bin /usr/bin /home /var/home -name "*saml*" -o -name "*gp*" -o -name "*globalprotect*" 2>/dev/null | grep -v ".git" | head -20; find /etc/NetworkManager /etc/vpnc /etc/openconnect -type f 2>/dev/null | head -20)

Bash(find /var/home/mrtrick -name "*.py" -o -name "*.sh" 2>/dev/null | xargs grep -l -i "saml\\|Login Successful\\|globalprotect\\|gp vpn" 2>/dev/null | head -10; ps aux | grep -i "saml\\|vpn\\|openconnect\\|webengine" | grep -v grep)
